subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! The Lord of Oneness hath caused the lights of guidance to shine forth and hath bestowed the bounty of His grace [3.5s]... ...O ye loved ones of God! Out of gratitude for firmness in the eternal Covenant arise to serve the threshold of the omnipotent Lord, observe obligatory prayer and fasting
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان معنوی حضرت احدیت اشراق انوار هدایت فرمود و فیض عنایت مبذول داشت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
